creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Dienstag, 29. Januar 2008 07:00:09 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of deskutils/phprojekt,
>
> Please note that PR ports/120110 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/120110

Looks ok for me. Commit it! :-)

So long...

Gerrit
